---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest a new guardrail, example, module improvement, or workflow.
title: "[Feature]: "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ""
---

## Summary

What improvement are you proposing?

## Problem

What recurring failure mode or workflow gap does this address?

## Proposed change

Describe the smallest useful change.

## Affected area

- [ ] `defense/`
- [ ] `continuity/`
- [ ] `quality/`
- [ ] `review/`
- [ ] `watchdog/`
- [ ] `docs/`
- [ ] `examples/`
- [ ] Platform adaptation
- [ ] Other:

## Safety boundaries

Confirm the proposal does not require:

- [ ] Real credentials, tokens, keys, or private logs
- [ ] Hidden instructions to users, maintainers, or AI agents
- [ ] Claims of complete security, perfect memory, or guaranteed correctness
- [ ] Automatically running unreviewed code

If any item above is required, explain why and how it would be made safe.

## Alternatives considered

What simpler approach did you consider?

## Additional context

Add links, examples, or notes. Use public or synthetic examples only.
